creator: admin@lissyara.su
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#       xneur
#       xneur/pkg-plist
#       xneur/pkg-descr
#       xneur/distinfo
#       xneur/Makefile
#
echo c - xneur
mkdir -p xneur > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - xneur/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >xneur/pkg-plist << 'END-of-xneur/pkg-plist'
Xbin/xneur
Xetc/xneur/en/dict
Xetc/xneur/en/proto
Xetc/xneur/ru/dict
Xetc/xneur/ru/proto
Xetc/xneur/xneurrc
Xlib/libxnconfig.a
Xlib/libxnconfig.so.3
Xlib/libxnconfig.so
Xlib/libxnconfig.la
X@dirrm etc/xneur/ru
X@dirrm etc/xneur/en
X@dirrm etc/xneur
X
END-of-xneur/pkg-plist
echo x - xneur/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >xneur/pkg-descr << 'END-of-xneur/pkg-descr'
XXNeur - backend for gXNeur - automatic keyboard switcher
X
XWWW: http://www.xneur.ru/
X
X- lissyaraadmin@lissyara.su
END-of-xneur/pkg-descr
echo x - xneur/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >xneur/distinfo << 'END-of-xneur/distinfo'
XMD5 (XNeur-0.3.tar.bz2) = 3732ef3a8d36064beac250b89a568aad
XSHA256 (XNeur-0.3.tar.bz2) = 6a42c5a8073d72d279756bfc43ec26d574277d4bca61fa0bf7da569a6eaff136
XSIZE (XNeur-0.3.tar.bz2) = 349569
END-of-xneur/distinfo
echo x - xneur/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >xneur/Makefile << 'END-of-xneur/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for: xneur
X# Date created:         January 17 2007
X# Whom:                 Alex Keda <admin@lissyara.su>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=      XNeur
XPORTVERSION=   0.3
XCATEGORIES=    russian
XMASTER_SITES=  http://dists.xneur.ru/release-0.3.0/tgz/
XPKGNAMEPREFIX= ru-
XDISTNAME=      ${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
X
XMAINTAINER=    admin@lissyara.su
XCOMMENT=       Auto keyboard switcher
X
XGNU_CONFIGURE= yes
XUSE_XLIB=      yes
XUSE_BZIP2=     yes
XUSE_LDCONFIG=  yes
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-xneur/Makefile
exit

Fix: 

-
How-To-Repeat: -
